summary: The review hardened this surface: symlink components and dangling symlink leaves are collisions (checked without following links, closing write-outside-target escapes via copytree/copy2/ensure_onboarding/touch); non-regular files (dirs, FIFOs) at append/touch paths refused before any write; pre-existing files inside manifest-covered gate trees (.agents/scripts|schemas|prompts) refused so init cannot bless untrusted client files into constitution/VENDOR_MANIFEST.json. Gate tests cover each escape.
residual_risks: TOCTOU between preflight and copy is out of scope: init is a developer bootstrap command, not a privilege boundary
